who: procurement managers in mid-sized retail companies using Shopify, processing 10–20 vendor scorecards/month
offer: For procurement managers in mid-sized retail companies using Shopify processing 10–20 vendor scorecards/month, inconsistent evaluations cause missed opportunities for improvement. We streamline scheduling and sending of scorecards instead of manual tracking.
problem: Inconsistent vendor performance evaluations lead to missed opportunities for improvement.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement managers
Engage on Indie Hackers about similar workflows
DM outreach to procurement managers with demo video
Participate in community forums for procurement tools
try_it: Let users try customizable scorecard templates and monthly reports on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing vendor data
One-click export of simple performance reports
